---
title: "Why Open Source"
title-block-style: none
description: "Compare open-source infrastructure with proprietary alternatives. See the real differences in cost, control, security, and EU compliance."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag">chen.ist</div>
    <h1>Why Open Source?</h1>
    <p>Compare open-source infrastructure with proprietary alternatives. Real differences, not marketing.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- COMPARISON TABLE -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:900px;">
    <h2>Open Source vs. Proprietary</h2>
    <p class="sub">A practical comparison for European organizations.</p>

    <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr; gap:0; border-radius:16px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.15);">
      <!-- Header -->
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1.5rem; font-weight:700; font-size:0.8rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; color:#86868b;"></div>
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1rem; text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; color:#81BD4A;">Open Source</div>
      <div style="padding:1.25rem 1rem; text-align:center; font-weight:700; font-size:0.85rem; color:#86868b;">Proprietary</div>

      <!-- Rows -->
      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Licensing cost</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Free</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Per user/month</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Data location</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">You choose (EU)</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Vendor decides</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Vendor lock-in</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">None</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Significant</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Source code access</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Full</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Closed</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">GDPR compliance</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">By design</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Depends on vendor</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Security audits</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Community + you</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Vendor only</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Customization</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Unlimited</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Limited by vendor</div>

      <div style="padding:1rem 1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem;">Exit strategy</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; background:rgba(129,189,74,0.03); color:#81BD4A; font-weight:600;">Your data, your format</div>
      <div style="padding:1rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(129,189,74,0.06); text-align:center; color:#86868b;">Migration pain</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- REAL ALTERNATIVES -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>What replaces what</h2>
    <p class="sub">Production-ready open-source alternatives you can deploy today.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Microsoft 365</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Nextcloud + Collabora</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Files, email, calendar, contacts, real-time document editing. Self-hosted, EU data.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Azure AD</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Keycloak + FreeIPA</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">SSO, MFA, LDAP directory, federated identity. Enterprise-grade, zero licensing.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Slack / Teams</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Matrix / Mattermost</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Encrypted messaging, federation, channels, threads. Full control over data.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Zoom</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Jitsi Meet</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Browser-based video, no accounts needed. Screen sharing, recording, breakout rooms.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Datadog / Splunk</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">Prometheus + Grafana</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Metrics, dashboards, alerting. Scales from 5 to 5,000 servers.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Windows Server</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">→</span> <span style="color:#81BD4A;">NixOS / Debian</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">Declarative, reproducible servers. No per-server licensing.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SAVINGS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Cost savings"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>40–70% cost savings.<br>Not a promise — math.</h2>
        <p>A 50-person organization running Microsoft 365 E3 pays ~EUR 22/user/month (EUR 13,200/year). The open-source equivalent (Nextcloud, Keycloak, Matrix, Jitsi) costs EUR 0 in licensing — you pay only for hosting and management.</p>
        <p>Even with professional managed services from chen.ist, most organizations save 40-70% compared to commercial SaaS licensing.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/digital/" class="m-lk">Our infrastructure services</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EU ANGLE -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">0</div><div class="m-nl">Per-user fees</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">EU</div><div class="m-nl">Data stays here</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Code auditable</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">40-70%</div><div class="m-nl">Cost savings</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to take control<br>of your infrastructure?</h2>
    <p>Free 30-minute consultation. We'll map your current stack and show you what's possible.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b">Book a consultation</a>
      <a href="/digital/" class="m-bo">Our services</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
